name: Fantastic Pork Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice pork across grain into 1/8-inch strips.
2. Marinate the pork strips in garlic, oregano, cumin, salt, orange juice, vinegar, and hot pepper sauce for 10 minutes.
3. Heat a heavy skillet or griddle until hot. Add the tablespoon of oil, onion, green pepper, and pork strips; stir fry until the pork is no longer pink, about 3 - 5 minutes.
4. Serve with flour tortillas and accompany with sliced green onion, shredded lettuce, and salsa.
